新品首发

category_tips.skincare: rose gold accents, luxury gift aesthetic, transformation promise
category_tips.fashion: editorial style, model inclusion, aspirational lifestyle
category_tips.home: warm colors, lifestyle integration, comfort focus
category_tips.furniture: comfort hero, premium material, room integration
category_tips.tech: dark background, neon accents, futuristic typography
category_tips.food: warm colors, freshness cues, dynamic food elements

examples: Promotional campaign banner. {product_description} centered hero on {background_theme}. Top headline 「{headline_text}」 in bold font size 36-48pt color {headline_color_hex}. Price display {price_info} with original price crossed out. Bottom CTA button 「{cta_text}」 color {cta_color_hex}. {urgency_element} integrated into layout. Clean marketing design, conversion-focused. 1080x1350px or 1080x1920px depending on platform

Sale event banner. {product_description} floating slightly on gradient {background_theme}. Bold promotional headline 「{headline_text}」 at top. Center shows product hero with price badge {price_info}. {urgency_element} creates urgency. Bottom {cta_text} button prominent. High visual impact, attention-grabbing layout. Platform-specific dimensions

style_lock_fields.palette: 促销主题色 + 强调色
style_lock_fields.lighting: 明亮光线或戏剧性光线
style_lock_fields.composition: 产品英雄 + 文案层级分明
